location: On a corpse in an armory behind a Stonesword Key fog wall inside Stormveil Castle, reached from the Rampart Tower Site of Grace elevator down into the Grafted Scion's room, then left through two doors.

source.name: Corpse in the Stormveil armory (behind Stonesword Key door)

tactics: Take the lift down from Rampart Tower grace into the room patrolled by the wandering Grafted Scion — you can usually slip past it to the doors on the left rather than fighting it.
Use a Stonesword Key on the fogged armory door; inside are axe-wielding guards, so fight them in the doorway rather than getting surrounded.
The dagger sits on a corpse in the room's north corner alongside a Hawk Crest Wooden Shield and an Iron Whetblade — grab all three in one trip.
lore: Favored by battlefield physicians for its precision, this dagger's hard, needle-like point is built to land brutally effective finishing strikes — a blunt reminder that mercy on a battlefield often looks like a killing blow.

builds.name: Critical/backstab specialist
builds.why: Highest critical multiplier of any dagger (140) makes it the go-to choice for backstab- and riposte-focused dex builds.

builds.name: Early quality poke
builds.why: Solid base physical damage and low requirements (7/12) make it a strong pickup right out of Stormveil for almost any melee build.
